terms.title: Z-transform
terms.summary: Z-transform is a glossary node in the AI/ML learning graph. Compare it with Scattering Transform Network (ScatNet) and Probability Integral Transform. It opens into Hilbert Transform and Laplace Transform.

related: Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) in Neural Networks
